opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My bladder feels like it's filled with battery acid and razor blades; I'm in so much pain I can't breathe properly.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on over the last half day and nothing I take helps — I'm on the bathroom floor and desperate.

symptom_narrative.onset: started with mild pressure about 12 hours ago and escalated fast
symptom_narrative.character: burning, acid, razor-blade pain in my bladder and low belly
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: 10 out of 10; I'm breathing fast because of the pain
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low central belly/bladder, and it hurts across my lower tummy
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, with agony on filling and voiding, going every ~10 minutes
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: almost nothing; heat helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: filling the bladder and voiding, any movement
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: passing only drops with burning, exhausted from no sleep and constant pain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have interstitial cystitis and get flares but this is the worst
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't walk from the pelvic spasm; I'm stuck on the bathroom floor

past_medical_history.how_managed: diet, heat, and flares as they come

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing relevant that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: my spouse is here with me and I'm frightened and desperate

communication_style.typical_message_style: frightened, catastrophising, pleading for strong relief

objective_data_offered.value: I'm passing just drops and there might be a tinge of blood, but no obvious clots
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: visual self-report; not a urine dipstick or culture

objective_data_offered.value: my heart is racing and I'm breathing fast because of the pain
